test.name: TC03 - Nonexistent Booking Should Not Be Retrieved

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=booking_session, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=10, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/999999 path_url=/booking/999999 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/999999 status=404, reason=Not Found headers={'Content-Length': '9', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', 'Date': 'Sun, 10 May 2026 13:57:16 GMT', 'Etag': 'W/"9-0gXL1ngzMqISxa6S1zx3F4wtLyg"', 'Nel': '{"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1}', 'Report-To': '{"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=LsZN%2BeRExgPSJWXEJkkvEMgfi9ofi5Vx%2BUYM1ZMuaAg%3D\\u0026sid=c46efe9b-d3d2-4a0c-8c76-bfafa16c5add\\u0026ts=1778421436"}],"max_age":3600}', 'Reporting-Endpoints': 'heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=LsZN%2BeRExgPSJWXEJkkvEMgfi9ofi5Vx%2BUYM1ZMuaAg%3D&sid=c46efe9b-d3d2-4a0c-8c76-bfafa16c5add&ts=1778421436"', 'Server': 'Heroku', 'Via': '1.1 heroku-router', 'X-Powered-By': 'Express'} body=Not Found

/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'restful-booker.herokuapp.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
